top_signals.title: US Crude Grades Shed Iran War Premium as Energy Crisis Eases
top_signals.summary: Key US oil grades have slumped to trade at a discount again as a gush of crude flows through the Strait of Hormuz and a recent spike in demand for American exports fades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Shares in Uber-backed Lime surge after it raised $167mn in IPO
top_signals.summary: Bike and scooter group’s shares were initially priced at $25 in deal underwritten by Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Jefferies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Zelenskyy urges EU to sanction Russian-owned alumina plant in Ireland
top_signals.summary: Call on the opening day of Dublin’s EU presidency adds to pressure over Aughinish Alumina smelter
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Italian tech group Bending Spoons jumps on Nasdaq debut
top_signals.summary: Acquisitive owner of Vimeo, AOL and Eventbrite raises $1.68bn in one of Europe’s biggest technology IPOs this year
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Aluminum Smelter Idled Since 2024 to Restart as Trump Looks to Revive Industry
top_signals.summary: An idled aluminum smelter in Missouri will restart production before the end of this year, helping to boost output of the metal amid the Trump administration’s push to revive the domestic industry.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court checks Trump, but empowers the presidency
top_signals.summary: Despite losses on tariffs and birthright citizenship, the executive has emerged stronger
